metadata.name: F1 Laps
metadata.description: Per-lap timing data: lap times, sector times, tyre compound and life, speed traps, position, and track status. One row per lap per driver. Primary dataset for pace and strategy analysis.

metadata.name: F1 Session Results
metadata.description: Session classification per driver: finishing position, points, grid position, Q1/Q2/Q3 times, and driver/team identity. One row per driver per session.

metadata.name: F1 Weather
metadata.description: Weather samples taken ~once per minute throughout each session: air and track temperature, humidity, wind direction and speed, pressure, and rainfall flag.

metadata.name: F1 Telemetry
metadata.description: Merged and interpolated car + position telemetry sampled at ~240 Hz. Includes speed, RPM, gear, throttle, brake, DRS, X/Y/Z coordinates, lap distance, and gap to driver ahead. Best default for telemetry queries.

metadata.name: F1 Car Telemetry
metadata.description: Raw car telemetry sampled at ~240 Hz: speed, RPM, gear, throttle position, brake, and DRS state. Use when you need unmerged car data without position channels.

metadata.name: F1 Position Data
metadata.description: Raw GPS/positional telemetry sampled at ~15-20 Hz: X, Y, Z coordinates in circuit-relative space (1/10 metre units) and on/off track status.

metadata.name: F1 Season Schedule
metadata.description: Season event calendar: round numbers, event names, countries, locations, session dates, and event format (conventional vs sprint weekend).
